briefdescription.para: Number of key IDs returned for RSA/ECC key pair generation command.
Exact RSA private key attribute value indicating presence of prime components.
This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform Key Vault creation for the requested subsystem with the provided inputs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyManagerSubVaultParams structure which holds the parameters of KeyVault input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform AES key generation for the requested subsystem on the provided key size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyManagerParams structure which holds the parameters of KeyVault input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform AES IV generation for the requested subsystem on the provided IV size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyManagerParams structure which holds the parameters of KeyVault input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform key vault deletion for the requested subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
ID of the vault to be deleted.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform key deletion from the vault for the requested subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Composite key identifier containing VaultId (bits [23:16]), KeyType (bits [31:24]), and KeyIndex (bits [15:0]).

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Validate KeyId is not zero.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform RSA key pair generation for the requested subsystem on the provided key size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyManagerParams structure which holds the parameters of KeyVault input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validation of inputs.
Key attribute should be set to indicate presence of prime components for RSA private key.
Validate key length is either 2048-bit or 3072-bit or 4096-bit for RSA.

Generate a unique ID and register the callback function. Two key IDs will be returned for RSA key pair generation command and stores at the address provided in KmSubVaultParamPtr->KeyIdAddr by the client:
First key ID will be the public key ID
Second key ID will be the private key ID
The size allocated for key IDs should be (XASU_KM_NUM_OF_KEY_IDS * XASU_KM_OUTPUT_ID_SIZE_IN_BYTES) to store both the key IDs.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform ECC key pair generation for the requested subsystem on the provided key size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyManagerParams structure which holds the parameters of KeyVault input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validation of inputs.
Validate the curve length and curve type for ECC.

Generate a unique ID and register the callback function. Two key IDs will be returned for ECC key pair generation command and stores at the address provided in KmSubVaultParamPtr->KeyIdAddr by the client:
First key ID will be the public key ID
Second key ID will be the private key ID
The size allocated for key IDs should be (XASU_KM_NUM_OF_KEY_IDS * XASU_KM_OUTPUT_ID_SIZE_IN_BYTES) to store both the key IDs.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to store a key in the vault for the requested subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyManagerParams structure which holds the key parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Validate key metadata.
KeyType may have the wrapped-key bit set by the caller. Mask it out before comparing against the sub-vault identifier to validate key attributes.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform raw key generation for the requested subsystem on the provided key size.

detaileddescription.para: This can be used for KDF and HMAC key generation in the key vault.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyManagerParams structure which holds the parameters of KeyVault input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to export the key vault.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyVaultTransferParams structure which holds the export parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if unique ID generation fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to import the key vault.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyVaultTransferParams structure which holds the import parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if unique ID generation fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for KeyManager driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ss 11/25/25 Initial release yog 01/28/26 Added RSA key pair generation client API.
